question: [Deltarune] Is Asriel dead?
textDescription:
In the videogame Deltarune, will it be revealed that the character Asriel is dead as of the outset of the main story? Asriel must be already dead by the end of chapter 2- this is not a market on whether Asriel will die. 

Update 2025-05-12 (PST) (AI summary of creator comment): * Trading will be paused around June 4, 2024, for approximately two weeks to avoid spoilers related to Chapters 3/4.

If Chapters 3/4 provide an answer to the market question, the market will resolve after this pause.

If Chapters 3/4 do not provide an answer, trading will resume after the pause.

Update 2025-06-02 (PST) (AI summary of creator comment): If Chapters 3/4 provide a clear answer to the market question:

Resolution may be delayed longer than the initial ~two-week trading pause (which starts around June 4, 2024) to further prevent spoilers.

The exact length of this potential additional delay is to be determined by the creator.
